case_title: MAY Y. CHAN VS. C & H PLUMBING CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, MAY Y. AS TO DEFENDANT C & H PLUMBING CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. PRIOR TO TODAYS HEARING OUTSIDE THE COURTROOM, DEFENDANT TOM GUNSEL SPEAKS WITH THE PLAINTIFF AND IT IS DETERMINED THAT HIS COMPANY C & H PLUMBING, IS NOT THE CORRECT PARTY TO HAVE THIS CLAIM AGAINST. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO DISMISS THIS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHAN, MAY Y. AS TO DEFENDANT C & H PLUMBING CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER RE: DISSMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFFS REQEUST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
